query:
SELECT 'total_deals' as metric, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM deals WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'total_contacts' as metric, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM contacts WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'total_pipelines' as metric, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM pipelines;
